tree.name: Nick Richards
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: Bulls traded Ousmane Dieng to Bucks; Bucks traded Cole Anthony and Amir Coffey to Suns; Suns traded Nick Richards to Bulls and Nigel Hayes-Davis to Bucks. Chicago also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: Ousmane Dieng
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Bulls traded Coby White and Mike Conley to Hornets for Collin Sexton, Ousmane Dieng, and two 2031 2nd-round picks (DEN own, NYK own).
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from CHA on Feb 4, traded to MIL next day in Nick Richards 3-team deal

assetsGivenUp.name: Coby White
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 7th overall by Chicago Bulls from UNC in 2019 NBA Draft
